package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for rand_newsource_with_time_now_per_call: `rand.NewSource(...)` seeded from wall clock on each call path.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario626Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
